name: x86_64-abi-reference
content: ﻿ x86_64 System V ABI - Reference System V Application Binary Interface - AMD64 Architecture Processor Supplement Official Reference x86_64 ABI PDF (0.99) System V ABI generic Key Topics Calling convention: RDI, RSI, RDX, RCX, R8, R9 for integer args; XMM0-7 for float args Stack alignment: 16 bytes before CALL Return values: RAX for integers, XMM0 for floats ELF format: executable, shared object, relocatable Register usage: callee-saved (RBX, RBP, R12-R15), caller-saved (others) Source: Linux Foundation - https://refspecs.linuxfoundation.org/
